display: Sons of the Forest Dedicated Server ARM64

blob_sync_port.desc: UDP port used by the BlobSync system.

game_port.desc: UDP port used for gameplay netcode.

password.desc: Set the server password. Leave blank for no password.

query_port.desc: UDP port used by Steam to list the server.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/sotf && until [ -f /tmp/sotf/SonsOfTheForestDS.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2465200 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2465200 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/sotf +login anonymous +app_update 2465200 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/sotf/SonsOfTheForestDS.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/sotf/. . && rm -rf /tmp/sotf'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u sotf >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m sotf || adduser -D sotf; mkdir -p /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R sotf:sotf . /home/sotf/.steam; exec runuser -u sotf -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/sotf/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./SonsOfTheForestDS.exe -userdatapath "./config" -dedicatedserver.ServerName "${name}" -dedicatedserver.Password "${password}" -dedicatedserver.MaxPlayers "${max_players}" -dedicatedserver.GamePort "${game_port}" -dedicatedserver.QueryPort "${query_port}" -dedicatedserver.BlobSyncPort "${blob_sync_port}"'

name: sonsoftheforest-arm64
